title: Filipino Eggplant Kaldereta
description: A jammy and bouncy ovo-vegetarian Filipino dish featuring bay leaf and served in an agave leaf vessel, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out a rectangle of pastry large enough to wrap around the eggplant.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Wrap the pastry around the eggplant, pressing the edges to seal.
Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the tomato sauce, bay leaf, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Place the wrapped eggplant in the agave leaf vessel and pour the sauce over it.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown and the eggplant is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with additional bay leaves if desired.
